scripts.predev: mkdir -p dist && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/core/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.js dist/ffmpeg-core.js && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/core/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.wasm dist/ffmpeg-core.wasm && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/core/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.worker.js dist/ffmpeg-core.worker.js 2>/dev/null || true && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg/dist/umd/ffmpeg.js dist/ffmpeg-lib.js && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg/dist/umd/814.ffmpeg.js dist/814.ffmpeg.js
scripts.build: NODE_ENV=production node_modules/.bin/webpack --config webpack.config.js && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/core/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.js dist/ffmpeg-core.js && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/core/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.wasm dist/ffmpeg-core.wasm && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/core/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.worker.js dist/ffmpeg-core.worker.js 2>/dev/null || true && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg/dist/umd/ffmpeg.js dist/ffmpeg-lib.js && cp node_modules/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg/dist/umd/814.ffmpeg.js dist/814.ffmpeg.js && cp robots.txt sitemap.xml manifest.json _redirects _headers dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && test -f dist/ffmpeg-core.wasm && echo 'FFmpeg WASM copied OK' || (echo 'ERROR: dist/ffmpeg-core.wasm missing' && exit 1)
